evals.prompt: Check what local AI models I have installed and show me my GPU setup
evals.expected_output: Detects GPU (NVIDIA detected via nvidia-smi), lists Ollama models (running on port 11434), shows backend status

evals.prompt: I want to install llama3.2 locally for coding assistance. My system has an RTX 4090 with 24GB VRAM
evals.expected_output: Recommends Ollama for easy setup, provides install commands, suggests codellama or llama3.2, configures GPU layers for 4090

evals.prompt: Compare the speed of llama3.2 q4_0 vs q8_0 quantization on my system
evals.expected_output: Uses benchmark script or provides comparison commands, explains quantization trade-offs, shows how to pull both versions

evals.prompt: Set up n8n to use my local Ollama instance for a chat workflow
evals.expected_output: Provides n8n HTTP Request node configuration for Ollama API (localhost:11434), shows chat endpoint setup

evals.prompt: I'm getting 'out of memory' errors with llama3.2 70B on my RTX 3060 (12GB). How can I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Suggests smaller model, quantization (q4_0), reduced context window, or offloading fewer layers to GPU
